recommendations.title: The Postman Always Rings Twice
recommendations.overview: A married woman and a drifter fall in love, then plot to murder her husband.

recommendations.title: Fatum
recommendations.overview: After receiving a tip-off, compulsive gambler Sergio returns to the betting house trying to recover all the money he has lost , but another gambler bursts into the place with a gun and a gunshot will change his life forever.

recommendations.title: The Hummingbird Project
recommendations.overview: A pair of high-frequency traders go up against their old boss in an effort to make millions in a fiber-optic cable deal.

recommendations.title: Find Me Falling
recommendations.overview: After a failed comeback album, a rock star retreats to a cliffside home on Cyprus, only to find his new life complicated by visitors — and an old flame.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: Dot the I
recommendations.overview: A fiery Spanish woman is about to marry a kind British man when she meets a Brazilian actor who ignites in her a flame of lust she can't ignore.

recommendations.title: Nahir
recommendations.overview: One of the most controversial cases in recent years in Argentina, this movie is based on the true story of Nahir Galarza and the murder of her boyfriend that rocked the country. The youngest woman to be convicted and sentenced to life in prison in Ar

recommendations.title: Young Adult
recommendations.overview: A divorced writer from the Midwest returns to her hometown to reconnect with an old flame, who's now married with a family.

recommendations.title: Argentina 1985
recommendations.overview: In the 1980s, a team of lawyers takes on the heads of Argentina's bloody military dictatorship in a battle against odds and a race against time.

recommendations.title: The Boy
recommendations.overview: An intimate portrait of a 9 year old sociopath as he discovers his taste for killing.
